label: Description pattern entry
description: Pairs an IdeoStoryPatternDef with a selection weight. Used by IdeoDescriptionMaker to randomly choose the description pattern for a structure meme.

def.label: Pattern def
def.description: IdeoStoryPatternDef providing the grammar rules for this description pattern.

weight.label: Weight
weight.description: Relative selection weight for this pattern. Higher values increase selection probability.
